blessed.note: "g4-hero-joy-longlegs-c is it" — chosen as Joy, the AITX animated logo.

references: explorations/mascot/_ref-michael-liked-2.png (the look Michael loved: joyful face, raised welcoming arms, split-mark lower body)
explorations/mascot/_ref-aitx-mark-clean.png (cropped from the real AITX mark, for the split two-piece geometry)
lineage.prompt: AITX MASCOT — a joyful cartoon character built on the AITX open-arms logo. Reference image 1 is the exact look to match: gleeful expression, raised-arms pose, split-mark lower body. Construction: a round HEAD with a big gleeful face (closed happy eyes and a wide open smile), two rounded cartoon ARMS raised up and out in a celebratory welcome, and a LOWER BODY that IS the AITX mark (image 2) — two mirrored orange arrowhead shapes pointing down-and-outward with a clear VERTICAL SPLIT straight down the middle (two legs). Warm hand-drawn comic style, bold clean outlines, slight inked texture and soft shading. Solid AITX orange #ff4201 on cream #fbf5ec. Single centered character, no text. Faithful hero take with a small heart floating above the head.

references: explorations/mascot/g3-hero-joy.png (keep identical, only change the legs)
lineage.prompt: Keep this exact character identical in every way — same joyful closed-eye happy face and wide open smile, same two arms raised up and out, same little heart floating above with the small emphasis marks, same warm hand-drawn comic style with slight texture and bold clean outline, same solid AITX orange #ff4201 on cream #fbf5ec, centered. Make only one change: extend the two bottom legs (the split lower-body, the two mirrored arrowhead legs) to be slightly longer so the character stands a little taller, keeping the clean vertical split straight down the middle. Do not change the face, arms, heart, color, outline, or style.
